99 Nights in the Forest

99 Nights in the Forest is an online survival game where you find yourself in a deserted forest. To be able to survive for 99 nights, you need to guard yourself from all possible dangers, including werewolves. Craft tools by collecting wood and other materials that you can find in the forest. Light a campfire to stay warm at night!

Play 99 Nights in the Forest Online

Loading game...
About 99 Nights in the Forest

99 Nights in the Forest is an online survival game where you find yourself in a deserted forest. To be able to survive for 99 nights, you need to guard yourself from all possible dangers, including werewolves. Craft tools by collecting wood and other materials that you can find in the forest. Light a campfire to stay warm at night! This browser game page adds original guidance and context so players can understand the challenge before the embedded game loads.

How to Play
  • Press play to load 99 Nights in the Forest in your browser.
  • Use the controls shown inside the game.
  • Keep practicing to improve your score and progress.
Game Features
Instant browser play Adventure game category Free online gameplay No download required
Frequently Asked Questions

Can I play 99 Nights in the Forest for free?

Yes. 99 Nights in the Forest is available as a free browser game on ArcadeNest.

Do I need to install 99 Nights in the Forest?

No installation is required. The game runs inside the browser iframe.
